market_snapshot.top_volume_spike: Bitcoin ETF outflows — $696.3M in a single day (June 26), pushing June total to $3.61B
market_snapshot.dominant_narrative: Bitcoin makes first sub-$60K close since Q3 2024, ETF assets down 57% from October 2025 peak, average IBIT investor down 40% — the worst week for Bitcoin ETFs since launch

selected_keyword.why: US spot Bitcoin ETFs logged $696.3M in daily outflows on June 26 — the largest single-day outflow of June — pushing monthly total to $3.61B and YTD losses to $4.6B, while Bitcoin made its first sub-$60K close since Q3 2024; The Block reported the average IBIT investor is now down ~40%, making this the dominant Persian-audience story with zero Persian coverage yet
